headline: Beijing political advisor Wei Xiaodong investigated; ex-Chengdu mayor accused of policy criticism
headline_zh: 北京市政协主席魏小东被查；原成都市长王凤朝被指妄议大政方针
narrative: The lead story is the dual anti-corruption signals from Beijing and Chengdu, indicating that the Party's discipline apparatus remains active at the provincial-ministerial level. The CAC's AI cybersecurity testing initiative signals a new front in tech regulation, while PwC's payout cuts remind foreign firms of the lingering Evergrande fallout. Wei Xiaodong's investigation, in particular, marks a rare high-profile case in the capital's political advisory body, potentially unsettling Beijing's local political landscape.
narrative_zh: 今日头条是来自北京和成都的双重反腐信号，表明党的纪律机构在省部级层面依然活跃。网信办的人工智能赋能网络安全应用测试公告，标志着科技监管的新战线；而普华永道削减合伙人薪酬则提醒外资企业恒大事件的余波未了。魏小东被查尤其罕见，涉及首都政协高层，可能动摇北京地方政治格局。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4027.736 ▼1.38% · Shenzhen Component 15314.7 ▼2.48% · ChiNext 3957.935 ▼3.20% · USD/CNY 6.766 ▼0.10% · USD/CNH 6.7888 ▲0.23%
